# Churn Lens — Buyer-Side SaaS Due Diligence

## About
Churn Lens is the buyer-side due diligence tool that catches hidden churn, concentration risk, and revenue decay in SaaS acquisition targets. Upload a subscription CSV and get a risk report in minutes.

## Key Pages
- Home: https://churnlens.site/
- Founder Story ($340K lesson): https://churnlens.site/why
- Pricing: https://churnlens.site/pricing
- Manifesto: https://churnlens.site/manifesto
- Free 23-Point Checklist: https://churnlens.site/get-the-checklist
- Partner Program: https://churnlens.site/partners
- Dream Customer Profile: https://churnlens.site/who
